channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Trump says US could charge for Strait of Hormuz passage amid Iran war
item.description: US president says Washington, as the 'winner' of the war, has a 'concept' for charging a toll in the strategic waterway.

item.title: Why is Iran’s Bushehr nuclear power plant being attacked?
item.description: The WHO has warned of 'catastrophic' risks if radioactive release occurs.

item.title: Protesters swarm US embassy in Tel Aviv, demanding end of wars
item.description: Protesters gathered outside the US embassy in Tel Aviv, calling for an end to the war with Iran and Lebanon.

item.title: Israeli air strike kills at least 10 Palestinians near Gaza school
item.description: Drones are reported to have fired missiles into an area near Maghazi refugee camp.

item.title: Lebanon’s Hezbollah and Yemen’s Houthis join Iran in strike on Israel
item.description: The Houthis in Yemen say they attacked Israel alongside their backers Iran and Hezbollah in Lebanon.

item.title: Trump claims Iranians begging US to keep bombing Iran
item.description: Donald Trump claimed the US has “numerous intercepts” of Iranians pleading for a continuation of bombing.

item.title: Video: Trump threatens to jail reporter over Iran airman rescue leak
item.description: Trump demanded the journalist who reported on the rescue of the US airman in Iran reveal their source.

item.title: Renewed Israeli strikes pound Lebanon as ground offensive deepens
item.description: Israeli forces launched renewed strikes across Lebanon, hitting the south and Beirut’s outskirts, killing civilians.

item.title: Child rescued from rubble after Russia ramps up strikes on Ukraine
item.description: A child was rescued from the rubble of a collapsed home in Odesa after a Russian strike killed at least three people.

item.title: Rescuers search for survivors after strikes hit homes in Iran
item.description: Iranian Red Crescent footage shows damage in Iran, as rescuers search for survivors after US-Israeli strikes hit homes.
